raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.7,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "R1.4": 0.3,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.3,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.3",
    "R1.5",
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Reframing the core contribution and problem context will make the thesis and gap around early lithium-plating detection clearer to readers.",
    "R1.2": "Checking the internal logic ensures that the progression from model and filtering approach to earlier detection and practical implications is consistent.",
    "R1.3": "Aligning claims with the stated results (e.g., 4–7 minutes earlier detection, r=0.78, 12% retention advantage) avoids misinterpretation of the reported evidence.",
    "R1.5": "Restructuring the abstract-level narrative (motivation, method, validation, key results, implications) will improve clarity and flow.",
    "R1.6": "Sentence-level polishing will enhance concision, readability, and scientific register without altering substance.",
    "RX.1": "Explicitly acknowledging limitations and uncertainties (e.g., lack of direct differential-voltage cross-validation) maintains transparency.",
    "RX.2": "Guarding against causal or generality overstatements (e.g., correlation versus causation, deployment contexts) prevents overstated claims.",
    "RX.3": "Maintaining strict focus on improving the given draft without adding new data or external material preserves scope.",
    "RX.4": "Avoiding prescriptive guidance that could encourage unsafe fast-charging behaviors reduces potential downstream harm.",
    "RX.5": "Ensuring all quantitative statements and assertions remain traceable to the provided text preserves provenance and auditability."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: Reframing the core contribution and problem context will make the thesis and gap around early lithium-plating detection clearer to readers.
rationale.R1.2: Checking the internal logic ensures that the progression from model and filtering approach to earlier detection and practical implications is consistent.
rationale.R1.3: Aligning claims with the stated results (e.g., 4–7 minutes earlier detection, r=0.78, 12% retention advantage) avoids misinterpretation of the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.5: Restructuring the abstract-level narrative (motivation, method, validation, key results, implications) will improve clarity and flow.
rationale.R1.6: Sentence-level polishing will enhance concision, readability, and scientific register without altering substance.
rationale.RX.1: Explicitly acknowledging limitations and uncertainties (e.g., lack of direct differential-voltage cross-validation) maintains transparency.
rationale.RX.2: Guarding against causal or generality overstatements (e.g., correlation versus causation, deployment contexts) prevents overstated claims.
rationale.RX.3: Maintaining strict focus on improving the given draft without adding new data or external material preserves scope.
rationale.RX.4: Avoiding prescriptive guidance that could encourage unsafe fast-charging behaviors reduces potential downstream harm.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring all quantitative statements and assertions remain traceable to the provided text preserves provenance and auditability.
